name: MRCB-Quill REIT
summary: MRCB-Quill REIT is a Malaysia-based real estate investment trust that invests in a diversified portfolio of commercial properties, including retail malls and office buildings, primarily in the Klang Valley region. The REIT generates income through rental revenue from its properties and aims to provide stable returns to its unitholders. The trust is managed by MRCB Quill Management Sdn Bhd.
